code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums: List<Int> = []
let n = string.len(line1)
mut i = 0
mut start = 0
mut in_tok = false
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line1, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_tok
      let tok = string.substring(line1, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    if not in_tok
      start = i
      in_tok = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_tok
  let tok = string.substring(line1, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let total = list.len(nums)
mut found_i = -1
mut found_j = -1
mut ii = 0
while ii < total and found_i < 0
  mut jj = ii + 1
  while jj < total and found_i < 0
    let a = match list.get(nums, ii)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let c = match list.get(nums, jj)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if a + c == target
      found_i = ii
      found_j = jj
    end
    jj = jj + 1
  end
  ii = ii + 1
end

if found_i < 0
  print("none")
else
  print("found=#{found_i},#{found_j}")
end
